arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher addresses 'clumsy' Mo Salah comments that angered Rio Ferdinand
arts.sum: Jamie Carragher has attempted to clarify his comments on the Africa Cup of Nations after drawing criticism for remarks made on Sky Sports when discussing Mo Salah's Ballon d'Or chances

arts.ttl: Real Madrid 'to offer midfielder to PSG' as part of a stunning 'swap deal' for 20-year-old magician
arts.sum: Real Madrid are allegedly determined to sign Paris Saint-Germain midfielder Joao Neves this summer and could offer Eduardo Camavinga as part of a move.
